query:
SELECT p.id, p.status, p.progresso, p.createdAt, p.updatedAt,
               u.name as userName,
               c.nome as cicloNome
        FROM pdis p
        LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
        LEFT JOIN ciclos c ON p.cicloId = c.id
        ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC
        LIMIT 5;
